data.body: Bug#10 (9d7c) hung-worker timeout+runbook: validated (mutation: removing wait_for -> worker hangs -> RED), claimed, pushed Gerrit 516. Bug#9 pushed 515. 8/10 bugs pushed. CI DIAGNOSIS: not stuck — FFO re-CI. 508 history: PS1 Verified+1, rebased x2 (after 507,510 merged) each drops Verified+re-runs; PS3 running now. All 7 in-review changes (508 509 512 513 514 515 516) currently on base ffcf2c662. PLAN CHANGE to avoid O(n^2) CI: submit SERIALLY — submit one, rebase only the NEXT (not bulk-rebase all). Remaining: #6 (d220 entrypoint) + #8 (406f grounding) subagents still running. Then land all serially + close each ticket after Verified+1 (ff main checkout from gerrit remote before close). Watch for stale tickets-tracker index.lock during rebar ops (reclaim if >30s — the very bug #2/512 fixes).
